guard_summary.scope: Prepared next bounded entity identity cleanup artifact after identity212-215, using read-only inspection and current override coverage.

live_duplicate_snapshot.method: Read-only replay of entity duplicate_global_identity scan from data/canonical/entities.jsonl with current data/identity-overrides/merges.json alias targets and data/identity-overrides/do-not-merge.json pair suppression; validate CLI was not run.

commands_used: sed -n read-only inspection of data/review_notes/codex-identity-batch212-prep.json, batch213, batch215, and absent batch214 probe
jq read-only inspection of data/identity-overrides/merges.json, data/identity-overrides/do-not-merge.json, and selected records in data/canonical/entities.jsonl
rg read-only prior-note/override coverage checks for selected record ids
bun --eval read-only duplicate scan over data/canonical/entities.jsonl with inline entity identity-key logic reproduced from packages/db/src/identity.ts
commands_attempted_but_not_used_for_resu: bun --eval importing @mta-wiki/db/identity failed to resolve the workspace package in bare eval; no files were written, and the final duplicate snapshot used an inline deterministic reproduction instead.
selection_filters: Excluded alias ids already present in data/identity-overrides/merges.json.
Excluded direct DNM pairs already present in data/identity-overrides/do-not-merge.json.
Excluded exact aliases already covered by current overrides or visible prior review/apply notes.

Checked identity212, identity213, and identity215 prep files directly; no data/review_notes/codex-identity-batch214-prep.json file was present in this checkout, so current overrides and applied cleanup notes were used as the batch214 coverage guard.
Preferred exact same agency, committee, unit, or person surfaces with compatible payload fields and source-backed evidence refs.
Used do_not_merge only for clear parent/child or agency/department collisions.
guard_summary.notes: The worktree was already dirty, including source-of-truth and generated files. This prep did not revert, overwrite, materialize, validate, export, or mutate those files.
